DISCOVERY 610, MOTION FOR AN ORDER COMPELLING DFNDNT ZIESCH TO FURTHER RESPOND TO FIRST DEMAND FOR DOCUMENTS, COMPELLING DFNDNT TO PROVIDE A PRIVILEGE LOG,OVERULING OBJECTIONS BASED ON ATTORNEY CLIENT AND WORK PRODUCT PRIVILEGES AND AWARDING ATTORNEYS FEES AS SANCTIONS FOR CONDUCT NECESSITATING - NO APPEARANCE AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: HEARING ON PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION, SET #1, IS CONTINUED UNTIL SEPTEMBER 8, 2004 AT 9:00 A.M. IN ORDER FOR DEFENDANT ZIESCH TO FILE A FORMAL OPPOSITION. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER AS TO WHETHER ALL RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS, WITH THE EXCEPTION OF ANY DOCUMENTS WITHHELD BASED ON AN ASSERTION OF THE ATTORNEY-CLIENT OR ATTORNEY-WORK PRODUCT PRIVILEGE, HAVE BEEN PRODUCED. ANY DOCUMENTS WITHHELD PURSUANT TO A CLAIM OF PRIVILEGE SHALL BE IDENTIFIED WITH PARTICULARITY, SPECIFYING THE CATEGORY OF CORRESPONDING REQUEST, DOCUMENT DESCRIPTION, IDENTITY AND POSITION OF AUTHOR, IDENTITY AND POSITION OF RECIPIENTS, PRIVILEGE CLAIMED, AND PRESENT LOCATION. THE REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. (610/BCHAN)

DISCOVERY 610, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER COMPELLING DEFENDANT BRESLER TO RESPOND TO 1ST DEMAND FOR DOCUMENTS,COMPELLING PRODUCTION OF A PREVILEGE LOG,OVERRULLING OBJECTIONS BASED ON ATTORNEY CLIENT AND WORK PRODUCT PRIVILEGES AND AWARDING ATTORNEYS FEES AS SANCTIONS FOR CONDUCT NECESSITATING THIS MOTION - NO APPEARANCE, TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION, SET #1, IS GRANTED IN PART. THE OBJECTIONS THAT THE REQUEST IS OPPRESSIVE AND BURDENSOME ARE OVERRULED. ANY DOCUMENTS WITHHELD PURSUANT TO A CLAIM OF PRIVILEGE SHALL BE IDENTIFIED WITH PARTICULARITY, SPECIFYING THE CATEGORY OF CORRESPONDING REQUEST, DOCUMENT DESCRIPTION, IDENTITY AND POSITION OF AUTHOR, IDENTITY AND POSITION OF RECIPIENTS, PRIVILEGE CLAIMED, AND PRESENT LOCATION. THE COURT IS UNABLE TO EITHER SUSTAIN OR OVERRULE AN OBJECTION BASED ON EITHER THE ATTORNEY-CLIENT OR ATTORNEY-WORK PRODUCT PRIVILEGE UNTIL AN ADEQUATE PRIVILEGE LOG IS PREPARED. THE REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. (610/BCHAN)
